# CartoBoost Agent Operating Guide

> CartoBoost is a temporal-spatial regression toolbox with a Python API, CLI tooling, and a benchmark-driven validation pipeline.

Use this guide as the first read before making changes. Start in the relevant code component, then update contracts, then run the validation commands defined in AGENTS.

## Workspace Overview
- [Repository README](https://github.com/TheCulliganMan/CartoBoost/blob/main/README.md): global project intent, quick workflow examples, and component-level capabilities.
- [Root AGENTS instructions](https://github.com/TheCulliganMan/CartoBoost/blob/main/AGENTS.md): workspace development rules, validation commands, and release caveats.
- [Python project manifest](https://github.com/TheCulliganMan/CartoBoost/blob/main/pyproject.toml): dependency groups and Python packaging settings.
- [Python environment lockfile](https://github.com/TheCulliganMan/CartoBoost/blob/main/uv.lock): pinned dependency state for reproducible Python builds.
- [Docs home](https://github.com/TheCulliganMan/CartoBoost/blob/main/docs/index.md): documentation index and user-facing map.
- [Docusaurus config](https://github.com/TheCulliganMan/CartoBoost/blob/main/docusaurus.config.ts): site metadata, navbar/footer, redirects, strict link handling, and GitHub Pages base URL.
- [Docusaurus sidebar](https://github.com/TheCulliganMan/CartoBoost/blob/main/sidebars.ts): task-oriented documentation navigation.
- [Docs homepage component](https://github.com/TheCulliganMan/CartoBoost/blob/main/src/pages/index.tsx): branded React landing page for the docs site.
- [Docs theme stylesheet](https://github.com/TheCulliganMan/CartoBoost/blob/main/src/css/custom.css): Docusaurus theme tokens and visual overrides.
- [Feature catalog](https://github.com/TheCulliganMan/CartoBoost/blob/main/docs/feature_catalog.md): complete public feature map across regression, forecasting, graph, neural, sparse, artifact, CLI, and benchmark surfaces.
- [General utilities](https://github.com/TheCulliganMan/CartoBoost/blob/main/docs/general_utilities.md): examples and plotting snippets for Kalman filters with smoothing, residual metrics, variance/gain/likelihood diagnostics, and interval distributions, plus ordinary kriging, intermittent-demand methods, and single-series forecast helpers.

## Core Components
- [Python package API](https://github.com/TheCulliganMan/CartoBoost/blob/main/python/cartoboost): user-facing estimator, graph helpers, neural feature workflows, and utility functions.
- [CLI reference](https://github.com/TheCulliganMan/CartoBoost/blob/main/docs/reference/cli.md): command behavior for `train`, `predict`, `eval`, and `inspect`.
- [Neural features guide](https://github.com/TheCulliganMan/CartoBoost/blob/main/docs/neural-features.md): ID embeddings, neural-augmented boosting, graph-aware fallback, and benchmark guidance.
- [Graph features guide](https://github.com/TheCulliganMan/CartoBoost/blob/main/docs/graph-features.md): node2vec, GraphSAGE, HeteroGraphSAGE, HinSAGE, directed source-target features, and graph feature bundle contracts.
- [Scripts folder](https://github.com/TheCulliganMan/CartoBoost/blob/main/scripts): acceptance metrics and dataset generation utilities used for validation.

## Documentation Contracts
- [Docs index](https://github.com/TheCulliganMan/CartoBoost/blob/main/docs/index.md): entrypoint and topical structure.
- [Installation guide](https://github.com/TheCulliganMan/CartoBoost/blob/main/docs/installation.md): install paths and optional extras.
- [Getting started](https://github.com/TheCulliganMan/CartoBoost/blob/main/docs/getting-started.md): first run flow and local checks.
- [Feature catalog](https://github.com/TheCulliganMan/CartoBoost/blob/main/docs/feature_catalog.md): full capability map and links to detailed topic pages.
- [Python API reference](https://github.com/TheCulliganMan/CartoBoost/blob/main/docs/reference/python-api.md): authoritative API contracts tied to scientific model choice.
- [CLI reference](https://github.com/TheCulliganMan/CartoBoost/blob/main/docs/reference/cli.md): argument/flag behavior and output formats.
- [Python estimator guide](https://github.com/TheCulliganMan/CartoBoost/blob/main/docs/user-guide/python-estimator.md): estimator usage and expected semantics.
- [Choose a model guide](https://github.com/TheCulliganMan/CartoBoost/blob/main/docs/user-guide/model-types.md): task-first router for the tabular regressor, forecasting classes, CartoBoost lag forecasting, kriging, neural embedding models, graph models, and utilities.
- [Model guides](https://github.com/TheCulliganMan/CartoBoost/blob/main/docs/user-guide/forecasting-models/index.md): model-specific examples for naive, seasonal naive, theta, ETS, ARIMA, AutoARIMA, Kalman, kriging, CartoBoost lag, and weighted ensembles; separate from the forecasting wrapper docs.
- [Naive and seasonal naive guide](https://github.com/TheCulliganMan/CartoBoost/blob/main/docs/user-guide/forecasting-models/naive-seasonal.md): baseline last-value and seasonal-repeat forecasting examples.
- [Theta guide](https://github.com/TheCulliganMan/CartoBoost/blob/main/docs/user-guide/forecasting-models/theta.md): manual theta, optimized theta, seasonal theta, and validation notes.
- [ETS guide](https://github.com/TheCulliganMan/CartoBoost/blob/main/docs/user-guide/forecasting-models/ets.md): additive ETS examples, parameters, and unsupported modes.
- [ARIMA and AutoARIMA guide](https://github.com/TheCulliganMan/CartoBoost/blob/main/docs/user-guide/forecasting-models/arima.md): fixed-order ARIMA, bounded non-seasonal AutoARIMA, native GIL-release notes, and benchmark guidance.
- [ARIMA examples](https://github.com/TheCulliganMan/CartoBoost/blob/main/docs/user-guide/forecasting-models/arima-examples.md): deterministic taxi-lane ARIMA visualization workflow, GIL smoke pattern, and native Criterion benchmark command.
- [Kalman guide](https://github.com/TheCulliganMan/CartoBoost/blob/main/docs/user-guide/forecasting-models/kalman.md): local-level, local-linear-trend, self-tuning AutoKalman forecasting examples, Matplotlib visual diagnostics, smoothing/filtering diagnostics, and variance-grid tuning notes.
- [Kriging guide](https://github.com/TheCulliganMan/CartoBoost/blob/main/docs/user-guide/forecasting-models/kriging.md): coordinate-aware panel forecasting examples, empirical/fitted variograms, drift/neighbor controls, cached all-neighbor scoring, and leave-one-out residual diagnostics.
- [CartoBoost lag guide](https://github.com/TheCulliganMan/CartoBoost/blob/main/docs/user-guide/forecasting-models/cartoboost-lag.md): global supervised lag forecasting examples and native feature support.
- [Weighted ensembles guide](https://github.com/TheCulliganMan/CartoBoost/blob/main/docs/user-guide/forecasting-models/ensembles.md): explicit fixed-weight native forecasting ensembles.
- [Forecasting overhaul](https://github.com/TheCulliganMan/CartoBoost/blob/main/docs/forecasting_overhaul.md): deterministic Rust-first direct, decomposition, AutoStats, reconciliation, probabilistic, neural, and ensemble architecture notes.
- [Forecasting reconciliation](https://github.com/TheCulliganMan/CartoBoost/blob/main/docs/forecasting_reconciliation.md): sparse hierarchy representation, bottom-up/top-down/middle-out/OLS/WLS/MinT-shrink reconciliation, and temporal aggregation rules.
- [CLI guide](https://github.com/TheCulliganMan/CartoBoost/blob/main/docs/user-guide/cli.md): workflow-oriented CLI usage patterns.
- [Feature schema](https://github.com/TheCulliganMan/CartoBoost/blob/main/docs/feature_schema.md): data schema and validation contract.
- [Sparse features](https://github.com/TheCulliganMan/CartoBoost/blob/main/docs/sparse_features.md): sparse-set, H3, and S2 helper contracts; H3/S2 deterministic validation and row assembly are Rust-backed.
- [Model artifact format](https://github.com/TheCulliganMan/CartoBoost/blob/main/docs/model_artifact.md): serialization and compatibility assumptions.
- [Constraints](https://github.com/TheCulliganMan/CartoBoost/blob/main/docs/constraints.md): legal/algorithmic domain constraints.
- [Spatial modeling](https://github.com/TheCulliganMan/CartoBoost/blob/main/docs/spatial_modeling.md): modeling assumptions for route/time/geographic features.
- [Graph features](https://github.com/TheCulliganMan/CartoBoost/blob/main/docs/graph-features.md): node2vec, GraphSAGE, HeteroGraphSAGE, HinSAGE, directionality, and metapath contracts.
- [General utilities](https://github.com/TheCulliganMan/CartoBoost/blob/main/docs/general_utilities.md): reusable Rust-backed utilities independent of the regressor and forecasting frame APIs.
- [Forecasting examples](https://github.com/TheCulliganMan/CartoBoost/blob/main/docs/forecasting_examples.md): runnable taxi-domain examples with visual diagnostics for naive, seasonal naive, theta, optimized theta, ETS, ARIMA, AutoARIMA, Kalman, kriging, CartoBoost lag, and weighted ensembles.
- [Benchmarks overview](https://github.com/TheCulliganMan/CartoBoost/blob/main/docs/benchmarks/index.md), [Forecasting benchmarks](https://github.com/TheCulliganMan/CartoBoost/blob/main/docs/benchmarks/forecasting.md), [NYC Taxi](https://github.com/TheCulliganMan/CartoBoost/blob/main/docs/benchmarks/nyc-taxi.md), [Taxi zone acceptance](https://github.com/TheCulliganMan/CartoBoost/blob/main/docs/benchmarks/taxi-zone.md): expected evidence format, maintained forecasting artifacts, new artifact provenance fields, refreshed M4/M5/M6 committed samples, M5 full-roster sample, M5/M6 `official_metrics` artifact sections, M6 training-window RPS calibration, full-run protocols, and metric definitions.

## Where to Edit by Change Type
- For model behavior changes: update [feature schema](https://github.com/TheCulliganMan/CartoBoost/blob/main/docs/feature_schema.md) + [tests](https://github.com/TheCulliganMan/CartoBoost/blob/main/tests) as needed.
- For forecasting model surface changes: update [Forecasting models](https://github.com/TheCulliganMan/CartoBoost/blob/main/docs/forecasting_models.md), the relevant [model guide](https://github.com/TheCulliganMan/CartoBoost/blob/main/docs/user-guide/forecasting-models/index.md), [Forecasting reconciliation](https://github.com/TheCulliganMan/CartoBoost/blob/main/docs/forecasting_reconciliation.md) when hierarchy behavior changes, [Feature catalog](https://github.com/TheCulliganMan/CartoBoost/blob/main/docs/feature_catalog.md), [Python API reference](https://github.com/TheCulliganMan/CartoBoost/blob/main/docs/reference/python-api.md), and this file.
- For CLI behavior and I/O format changes: update [CLI guide](https://github.com/TheCulliganMan/CartoBoost/blob/main/docs/user-guide/cli.md), [CLI reference](https://github.com/TheCulliganMan/CartoBoost/blob/main/docs/reference/cli.md), and integration tests under `../tests/integration`.
- For Python API changes: edit `python/cartoboost`, update [Python API reference](https://github.com/TheCulliganMan/CartoBoost/blob/main/docs/reference/python-api.md), and add/adjust tests under `../tests/python`.
- For reusable utility changes such as Kalman filters, kriging, or intermittent-demand helpers: update [General utilities](https://github.com/TheCulliganMan/CartoBoost/blob/main/docs/general_utilities.md), [Feature catalog](https://github.com/TheCulliganMan/CartoBoost/blob/main/docs/feature_catalog.md), and [Python API reference](https://github.com/TheCulliganMan/CartoBoost/blob/main/docs/reference/python-api.md).
- For benchmark or acceptance behavior changes: edit `scripts`, benchmark sources in `benches`, and benchmark docs under `docs/benchmarks`.

## Validation and Runtime Checks
- Run `uv run --group dev pre-commit run --all-files` for lint and format checks after source edits.
- Run `npm run typecheck` and `npm run build` after docs-site config, React, or Markdown navigation changes.
- Run `uv run --group dev pytest` after changing Python APIs or estimator behavior.
- Use `just validate` for full local validation only when comprehensive smoke coverage is needed.

## Optional
- [llms.txt spec](https://llmstxt.org/index.md): authoritative markdown format this file follows.
